'''jabasha''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:ukaz|ukaz]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-b-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ukaz|ukaz]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| jabasha
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæbæshæth|jæbæshæth]] || [[word:jæbæshæj|jæbæshæj]] || [[word:jæbæshæsh|jæbæshæsh]] || [[word:jæbæshæ|jæbæshæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:jababashath|jababashath]] || [[word:jababashaj|jababashaj]] || [[word:jababashash|jababashash]] || [[word:jababasha|jababasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:jabashath|jabashath]] || [[word:jabashaj|jabashaj]] || [[word:jabashash|jabashash]] || [[word:jabasha|jabasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:jabafshath|jabafshath]] || [[word:jabafshaj|jabafshaj]] || [[word:jabafshash|jabafshash]] || [[word:jabafshaf|jabafshaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jabashatha|jabashatha]] || [[word:jabashaja|jabashaja]] || [[word:jabashasha|jabashasha]] || [[word:jabashaka|jabashaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jabashath|jabashath]] || [[word:jabashaj|jabashaj]] || [[word:jabashash|jabashash]] || [[word:jabasha|jabasha]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jabashathal|jabashathal]] || [[word:jabashajal|jabashajal]] || [[word:jabashashal|jabashashal]] || [[word:jabashakal|jabashakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jabashathatha|jabashathatha]] || [[word:jabashajaja|jabashajaja]] || [[word:jabashashasha|jabashashasha]] || [[word:jabashaka|jabashaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jabashathan|jabashathan]] || [[word:jabashajan|jabashajan]] || [[word:jabashashan|jabashashan]] || [[word:jabashakan|jabashakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jabashathaoro|jabashathaoro]] || [[word:jabashajaoro|jabashajaoro]] || [[word:jabashashaoro|jabashashaoro]] || [[word:jabashakaoro|jabashakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|28ebc72}}
